issues.description: Missing third option: 'Place up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 1 or less at the top or bottom of their Life cards face-up.' No DSL action type exists for placing characters on Life cards.
Invalid entries with trigger:'Trigger' and maxCost:6. These do not correspond to the card text and appear to be erroneous data.
DrawCard is unconditional in DSL, but card text states 'Then, if you have a {Celestial Dragons} type Character, draw 1 card.' Requires condition: LeaderHasType or HasCardOnBoard with type filter.

suggestedDsl.note: Third option (Place on Life cards) cannot be represented with current DSL action types. Recommended DSL for first two options with conditional draw:
